														"community",
														"academic",
														"nonprofit",
														"startup"
													],
													"type": "string"
												}
											},
											"description": "Standard facets (always include)"
										}
									},
									"description": "CRITICAL: Properties extracted from the user's message.\n\nThis object is stored as JSONB and SHOULD contain:\n1. facets (context, scale, stage) - Standard project facets\n2. ALL relevant properties with values from the user's message using prop naming\n\n**Extraction Process**:\n- Use prop naming guidance (snake_case, is_/has_ for booleans, *_count, target_*)\n- For each meaningful attribute the user mentions, add it to props\n- Use intelligent defaults for properties inferable from context\n\n**Examples**:\n- Software app: user says \"Next.js app on Vercel, MVP for indie creators\" → props: { tech_stack: [\"nextjs\"], deployment_target: \"vercel\", is_mvp: true, target_users: \"indie creators\" }\n- Business launch: user says \"product launch in Feb with $75k budget and 500 target customers\" → props: { launch_date: \"2025-02-01\", budget: 75000, target_customers: 500, channels: [\"email\", \"paid_social\"] }\n- Event: user says \"wedding for 200 guests at Grand Hall\" → props: { venue: \"Grand Hall\", guest_count: 200, budget: null }\n- Creative book: user says \"YA sci-fi novel, 80k words, due Sept 1\" → props: { genre: \"sci-fi\", audience: \"ya\", target_word_count: 80000, deadline_date: \"2025-09-01\" }\n- Course: user says \"live LLM safety course, 8 lessons, 45 minutes each\" → props: { topic: \"LLM safety\", lesson_count: 8, target_duration_minutes: 45, delivery_mode: \"live\" }\n\nDO NOT leave props empty when information is available in the conversation!"
								},
								"end_at": {
									"type": "string",
									"description": "End date in ISO format (optional)"
								},
								"start_at": {
									"type": "string",
									"description": "Start date in ISO format (optional, default to now)"
								},
								"type_key": {
									"type": "string",
									"description": "Type classification (REQUIRED). Must use project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}] format with 3-4 segments. Realm MUST be one of: creative, technical, business, service, education, personal. Examples: \"project.business.product_launch\", \"project.creative.book\", \"project.technical.app.mobile\". Use the \"What does success look like?\" test to pick the right realm."
								},
								"state_key": {
									"type": "string",
									"description": "Initial state (optional, defaults to \"planning\"). Valid: planning, active, completed, cancelled."
								},
								"description": {
									"type": "string",
									"description": "Project description (optional - infer from user message)"
								}
							},
							"description": "Project definition (REQUIRED)"
						},
						"entities": {
							"type": "array",
							"items": {
								"type": "object",
								"required": ["temp_id", "kind"],
								"properties": {
									"uri": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"kind": {
										"enum": [
											"goal",
											"milestone",
											"plan",
											"task",
											"document",
											"risk",
											"metric",
											"source"
										],
										"type": "string"
									},
									"name": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"text": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"unit": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"props": {
										"type": "object"
									},
									"title": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"due_at": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"impact": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"content": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"temp_id": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"end_date": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"priority": {
										"type": "number"
									},
									"start_at": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"type_key": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"state_key": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"definition": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"start_date": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"description": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"probability": {
										"type": "number"
									},
									"target_date": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"snapshot_uri": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"target_value": {
										"type": "number"
									},
									"body_markdown": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"measurement_criteria": {
										"type": "string"
									}
								}
							},
							"default": [],
							"description": "Required entity list using temp_id + kind. Use entities + relationships only."
						},
						"relationships": {
							"type": "array",
							"items": {
								"oneOf": [
									{
										"type": "array",
										"items": {
											"type": "object",
											"required": ["temp_id", "kind"],
											"properties": {
												"kind": {
													"type": "string"
												},
												"temp_id": {
													"type": "string"
												}
											}
										},
										"maxItems": 2,
										"minItems": 2
									},
									{
										"type": "object",
										"required": ["from", "to"],
										"properties": {
											"to": {
												"type": "object",
												"required": ["temp_id", "kind"],
												"properties": {
													"kind": {
														"type": "string"
													},
													"temp_id": {
														"type": "string"
													}
												}
											},
											"rel": {
												"type": "string"
											},
											"from": {
												"type": "object",
												"required": ["temp_id", "kind"],
												"properties": {
													"kind": {
														"type": "string"
													},
													"temp_id": {
														"type": "string"
													}
												}
											},
											"intent": {
												"enum": ["containment", "semantic"],
												"type": "string"
											}
										}
									}
								]
							},
							"default": [],
							"description": "Directional connections between entities using temp_id (required even if empty). Each item can be [from, to] or { from, to, rel?, intent? }."
						},
						"clarifications": {
							"type": "array",
							"items": {
								"type": "object",
								"required": ["key", "question", "required"],
								"properties": {
									"key": {
										"type": "string",
										"description": "Unique key for this question"
									},
									"choices": {
										"type": "array",
										"items": {
											"type": "string"
										},
										"description": "Optional predefined choices"
									},
									"question": {
										"type": "string",
										"description": "The question to ask"
									},
									"required": {
										"type": "boolean",
										"description": "Whether answer is required"
									},
									"help_text": {
										"type": "string"
									}
								}
							},
							"description": "Questions for user if critical info is missing (use sparingly)"
						},
						"context_document": {
							"type": "object",
							"required": ["title", "content"],
							"properties": {
								"props": {
									"type": "object",
									"description": "Additional metadata (e.g., spark notes, tags)"
								},
								"title": {
									"type": "string"
								},
								"content": {
									"type": "string",
									"description": "Markdown body with the user braindump/overview (stored in content column)"
								},
								"type_key": {
									"type": "string",
									"description": "Defaults to document.context.project"
								},
								"state_key": {
									"type": "string",
									"description": "Document state (defaults to draft). Valid: draft, in_review, ready, published, archived."
								}
							},
							"description": "Canonical context document (document.context.project) that will be linked to the project."
						}
					}
				},
				"id_args": [],
				"summary": "Create a new project in the ontology system with full structure.",
				"examples": [
					{
						"tool_call": {
							"name": "create_onto_project",
							"arguments": {
								"project": {
									"name": "<project name>",
									"type_key": "project.business.initiative"
								},
								"entities": [],
								"relationships": []
							}
						},
						"description": "Create a minimal project skeleton"
					},
					{
						"tool_call": {
							"name": "create_onto_project",
							"arguments": {
								"project": {
									"name": "Learn Spanish",
									"type_key": "project.education.skill"
								},
								"entities": [
									{
										"kind": "goal",
										"name": "Conversational fluency",
										"temp_id": "g1"
									}
								],
								"relationships": []
							}
						},
						"description": "Create a project with one explicit goal"
					},
					{
						"tool_call": {
							"name": "create_onto_project",
							"arguments": {
								"project": {
									"name": "Product Launch",
									"type_key": "project.business.product_launch"
								},
								"entities": [
									{
										"kind": "goal",
										"name": "Launch MVP by Q2",
										"temp_id": "g1"
									},
									{
										"kind": "task",
										"title": "Schedule kickoff meeting",
										"temp_id": "t1"
									},
									{
										"kind": "task",
										"title": "Review vendor proposals",
										"temp_id": "t2"
									}
								],
								"relationships": [
									{
										"to": {
											"kind": "task",
											"temp_id": "t1"
										},
										"from": {
											"kind": "goal",
											"temp_id": "g1"
										}
									},
									{
										"to": {
											"kind": "task",
											"temp_id": "t2"
										},
										"from": {
											"kind": "goal",
											"temp_id": "g1"
										}
									}
								]
							}
						},
						"description": "Create a project with one goal and explicit tasks"
					}
				],
				"tool_name": "create_onto_project",
				"description": "Create a new project in the ontology system with full structure.\n\nThis is the PRIMARY tool for creating projects. It uses **entities + relationships only**\nto build the project graph:\n- Entities represent goals, plans, tasks, documents, risks, etc.\n- Relationships are directional pairs that drive containment + semantic edges.\n- Context document linkage (document.context.project) is supported.\n- Documents created here (including the context document) are added to the project's doc_structure at root level unless moved later.\n\n**IMPORTANT**: Extract what the user explicitly mentioned. Don't add structure they didn't ask for:\n- Project name from context\n- Appropriate type_key classification using project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}]\n- Start date (default to today if not specified)\n- Facets (context, scale, stage) from user intent\n- Props extracted from user's message - CRITICAL!\n\n**Start Simple (CRITICAL):**\n- Most new projects just need: project + 1 goal (if an outcome is stated) + maybe a few tasks (if explicit actions are mentioned)\n- Don't add plans/milestones unless user mentions phases, dates, or workstreams\n- Don't add peripheral entities (risks, documents, metrics, sources) unless explicitly mentioned\n- Simple projects are GOOD - structure grows over time\n\n**Props Extraction (CRITICAL)**:\n1. Use the prop conventions (snake_case, booleans as is_* or has_*)\n2. Extract ALL relevant values from the user's message (e.g., genre, tech_stack, audience, deadlines)\n3. Populate project.props (JSONB) with inferred values plus facets (context/scale/stage) when present\n\nExample: User says \"wedding for 150 guests at Grand Hall\"\n→ props: { facets: {...}, venue_details: { name: \"Grand Hall\" }, guest_count: 150, budget: null }\n\n**When to use clarifications array**:\nOnly add clarification questions if CRITICAL information is missing that you cannot reasonably infer.\nFor example:\n- If user says \"create a book project\", DON'T ask for project name - infer it's about a book\n- If user says \"start a project\", DO ask what kind of project\nWhen using clarifications, still include entities: [] and relationships: [] in the payload.\n\n**Workflow**:\n1. Infer the right type_key from taxonomy (project.creative.book, project.technical.app, etc.)\n2. Extract props from the user's message using prop naming guidance\n3. Fill in ProjectSpec with inferred data AND extracted props\n4. Add clarifications[] only if essential info is missing\n5. Call this tool with the complete spec\n\n**Examples (Start Simple):**\n\nSIMPLE PROJECT (just a goal, no tasks - most common for new projects):\n{\n  \"project\": { \"name\": \"Learn Spanish\", \"type_key\": \"project.education.skill\" },\n  \"entities\": [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\", \"name\": \"Conversational fluency\" }],\n  \"relationships\": []\n}\n\nPROJECT WITH TASKS (user mentioned specific actions):\n{\n  \"project\": { \"name\": \"Product Launch\", \"type_key\": \"project.business.product_launch\" },\n  \"entities\": [\n    { \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\", \"name\": \"Launch MVP by Q2\" },\n    { \"temp_id\": \"t1\", \"kind\": \"task\", \"title\": \"Schedule kickoff meeting\" },\n    { \"temp_id\": \"t2\", \"kind\": \"task\", \"title\": \"Review vendor proposals\" }\n  ],\n  \"relationships\": [\n    [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\" }, { \"temp_id\": \"t1\", \"kind\": \"task\" }],\n    [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\" }, { \"temp_id\": \"t2\", \"kind\": \"task\" }]\n  ]\n}\n\nPROJECT WITH PHASES (user mentioned workstreams):\n{\n  \"project\": { \"name\": \"Wedding Planning\", \"type_key\": \"project.service.event\" },\n  \"entities\": [\n    { \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\", \"name\": \"Perfect wedding day\" },\n    { \"temp_id\": \"p1\", \"kind\": \"plan\", \"name\": \"Venue & Catering\" },\n    { \"temp_id\": \"p2\", \"kind\": \"plan\", \"name\": \"Guest Management\" }\n  ],\n  \"relationships\": [\n    [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\" }, { \"temp_id\": \"p1\", \"kind\": \"plan\" }],\n    [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\" }, { \"temp_id\": \"p2\", \"kind\": \"plan\" }]\n  ]\n}\n\n**ProjectSpec Structure (entities + relationships only)**:\n{\n  project: {\n    name: string (REQUIRED - infer from user message),\n    type_key: string (REQUIRED - classify via project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}]),\n    description?: string (infer from user message),\n    state_key?: string (default: \"planning\", valid: planning|active|completed|cancelled),\n    props?: { facets?: { context?, scale?, stage? } },\n    start_at?: ISO datetime (default to now),\n    end_at?: ISO datetime\n  },\n  entities: [\n    { temp_id: string, kind: \"goal|milestone|plan|task|document|risk|metric|source\", ... }\n  ],\n  relationships: [\n    [ { temp_id, kind }, { temp_id, kind } ],\n    { from: { temp_id, kind }, to: { temp_id, kind }, rel?, intent? }\n  ],\n  context_document?: { title: string, content: string, props? },\n  clarifications?: [{ key, question, required, choices?, help_text? }],\n  meta?: { model, confidence, suggested_facets } (NOT sent to API)\n}\n\nRelationships are directional: [from, to] treats \"from\" as the entity being created/updated and \"to\" as its connection.\nentities + relationships are required even if empty (use [] for no links or clarifications).",
				"callable_tool": "create_onto_project",
				"required_args": ["project", "entities", "relationships"],
				"example_tool_call": {
					"tool_call": {
						"name": "create_onto_project",
						"arguments": {
							"project": {
								"name": "<project name>",
								"type_key": "project.business.initiative"
							},
							"entities": [],
							"relationships": []
						}
					}
				}
			},
			"linked_tool_execution": {
				"id": "b6aa9e03-2a62-4cb6-b7e8-0abd776cb767",
				"message_id": "911fae2e-ff8e-41be-acdd-6bcc0c748365",
				"turn_run_id": "b423c60d-2b1e-4e43-8403-c035d17ef29c",
				"stream_run_id": "2861d335-efe9-4745-a591-5a7dd7900f7d",
				"client_turn_id": "9f7ed5b1-36fb-4dd0-a6e5-40cb4f52ee44",
				"tool_name": "tool_schema",
				"tool_category": null,
				"gateway_op": null,
				"help_path": null,
				"sequence_index": 4,
				"success": true,
				"execution_time_ms": null,
				"tokens_consumed": null,
				"error_message": null,
				"requires_user_action": false,
				"arguments": {
					"op": "onto.project.create"
				},
				"result": {
					"op": "onto.project.create",
					"args": [
						{
							"name": "project",
							"type": "object",
							"required": true,
							"description": "Project definition (REQUIRED)"
						},
						{
							"name": "entities",
							"type": "array",
							"default": [],
							"required": true,
							"description": "Required entity list using temp_id + kind. Use entities + relationships only."
						},
						{
							"name": "relationships",
							"type": "array",
							"default": [],
							"required": true,
							"description": "Directional connections between entities using temp_id (required even if empty). Each item can be [from, to] or { from, to, rel?, intent? }."
						},
						{
							"name": "context_document",
							"type": "object",
							"required": false,
							"description": "Canonical context document (document.context.project) that will be linked to the project."
						},
						{
							"name": "clarifications",
							"type": "array",
							"required": false,
							"description": "Questions for user if critical info is missing (use sparingly)"
						},
						{
							"name": "meta",
							"type": "object",
							"required": false,
							"description": "Metadata about the generation (optional)"
						}
					],
					"type": "tool_schema",
					"notes": [
						"onto.project.create requires input.project, input.entities, and input.relationships.",
						"input.project must include project.name and project.type_key. Use entities: [] and relationships: [] when starting minimal.",
						"Infer project.name and project.type_key from the user message when reasonably possible, and use clarifications[] only for critical missing information.",
						"If relationships are present, each item must be [ { temp_id, kind }, { temp_id, kind } ] or { from: { temp_id, kind }, to: { temp_id, kind } }. Never use raw string pairs like [\"g1\", \"t1\"]."
					],
					"usage": "create_onto_project({ ... })",
					"policy": {
						"do": [
							"Infer project name and type_key from the user message",
							"Keep structure minimal unless the user explicitly mentions more"
						],
						"dont": [
							"Do not add entities the user did not mention",
							"Do not leave props empty when details are provided"
						],
						"edge_cases": [
							"If critical info is missing, add clarifications[] and still create"
						]
					},
					"schema": {
						"type": "object",
						"required": ["project", "entities", "relationships"],
						"properties": {
							"meta": {
								"type": "object",
								"properties": {
									"model": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"confidence": {
										"type": "number",
										"maximum": 1,
										"minimum": 0
									},
									"suggested_facets": {
										"type": "object",
										"properties": {
											"scale": {
												"type": "string"
											},
											"stage": {
												"type": "string"
											},
											"context": {
												"type": "string"
											}
										}
									}
								},
								"description": "Metadata about the generation (optional)"
							},
							"project": {
								"type": "object",
								"required": ["name", "type_key"],
								"properties": {
									"name": {
										"type": "string",
										"description": "Project name (REQUIRED - infer from user message)"
									},
									"props": {
										"type": "object",
										"properties": {
											"facets": {
												"type": "object",
												"properties": {
													"scale": {
														"enum": [
															"micro",
															"small",
															"medium",
															"large",
															"epic"
														],
														"type": "string"
													},
													"stage": {
														"enum": [
															"discovery",
															"planning",
															"execution",
															"launch",
															"maintenance",
															"complete"
														],
														"type": "string"
													},
													"context": {
														"enum": [
															"personal",
															"client",
															"commercial",
															"internal",
															"open_source",
															"community",
															"academic",
															"nonprofit",
															"startup"
														],
														"type": "string"
													}
												},
												"description": "Standard facets (always include)"
											}
										},
										"description": "CRITICAL: Properties extracted from the user's message.\n\nThis object is stored as JSONB and SHOULD contain:\n1. facets (context, scale, stage) - Standard project facets\n2. ALL relevant properties with values from the user's message using prop naming\n\n**Extraction Process**:\n- Use prop naming guidance (snake_case, is_/has_ for booleans, *_count, target_*)\n- For each meaningful attribute the user mentions, add it to props\n- Use intelligent defaults for properties inferable from context\n\n**Examples**:\n- Software app: user says \"Next.js app on Vercel, MVP for indie creators\" → props: { tech_stack: [\"nextjs\"], deployment_target: \"vercel\", is_mvp: true, target_users: \"indie creators\" }\n- Business launch: user says \"product launch in Feb with $75k budget and 500 target customers\" → props: { launch_date: \"2025-02-01\", budget: 75000, target_customers: 500, channels: [\"email\", \"paid_social\"] }\n- Event: user says \"wedding for 200 guests at Grand Hall\" → props: { venue: \"Grand Hall\", guest_count: 200, budget: null }\n- Creative book: user says \"YA sci-fi novel, 80k words, due Sept 1\" → props: { genre: \"sci-fi\", audience: \"ya\", target_word_count: 80000, deadline_date: \"2025-09-01\" }\n- Course: user says \"live LLM safety course, 8 lessons, 45 minutes each\" → props: { topic: \"LLM safety\", lesson_count: 8, target_duration_minutes: 45, delivery_mode: \"live\" }\n\nDO NOT leave props empty when information is available in the conversation!"
									},
									"end_at": {
										"type": "string",
										"description": "End date in ISO format (optional)"
									},
									"start_at": {
										"type": "string",
										"description": "Start date in ISO format (optional, default to now)"
									},
									"type_key": {
										"type": "string",
										"description": "Type classification (REQUIRED). Must use project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}] format with 3-4 segments. Realm MUST be one of: creative, technical, business, service, education, personal. Examples: \"project.business.product_launch\", \"project.creative.book\", \"project.technical.app.mobile\". Use the \"What does success look like?\" test to pick the right realm."
									},
									"state_key": {
										"type": "string",
										"description": "Initial state (optional, defaults to \"planning\"). Valid: planning, active, completed, cancelled."
									},
									"description": {
										"type": "string",
										"description": "Project description (optional - infer from user message)"
									}
								},
								"description": "Project definition (REQUIRED)"
							},
							"entities": {
								"type": "array",
								"items": {
									"type": "object",
									"required": ["temp_id", "kind"],

										},

										},

										},
										"target_value": {
											"type": "number"
										},
										"body_markdown": {
											"type": "string"
										},
										"measurement_criteria": {
											"type": "string"
										}
									}
								},
								"default": [],
								"description": "Required entity list using temp_id + kind. Use entities + relationships only."
							},
							"relationships": {
								"type": "array",
								"items": {
									"oneOf": [
										{
											"type": "array",
											"items": {
												"type": "object",
												"required": ["temp_id", "kind"],
												"properties": {
													"kind": {
														"type": "string"
													},
													"temp_id": {
														"type": "string"
													}
												}
											},
											"maxItems": 2,
											"minItems": 2
										},
										{
											"type": "object",
											"required": ["from", "to"],
											"properties": {
												"to": {
													"type": "object",
													"required": ["temp_id", "kind"],
													"properties": {
														"kind": {
															"type": "string"
														},
														"temp_id": {
															"type": "string"
														}
													}
												},
												"rel": {
													"type": "string"
												},
												"from": {
													"type": "object",
													"required": ["temp_id", "kind"],
													"properties": {
														"kind": {
															"type": "string"
														},
														"temp_id": {
															"type": "string"
														}
													}
												},
												"intent": {
													"enum": ["containment", "semantic"],
													"type": "string"
												}
											}
										}
									]
								},
								"default": [],
								"description": "Directional connections between entities using temp_id (required even if empty). Each item can be [from, to] or { from, to, rel?, intent? }."
							},
							"clarifications": {
								"type": "array",
								"items": {
									"type": "object",
									"required": ["key", "question", "required"],
									"properties": {
										"key": {
											"type": "string",
											"description": "Unique key for this question"
										},
										"choices": {
											"type": "array",
											"items": {
												"type": "string"
											},
											"description": "Optional predefined choices"
										},
										"question": {
											"type": "string",
											"description": "The question to ask"
										},
										"required": {
											"type": "boolean",
											"description": "Whether answer is required"
										},
										"help_text": {
											"type": "string"
										}
									}
								},
								"description": "Questions for user if critical info is missing (use sparingly)"
							},
							"context_document": {
								"type": "object",
								"required": ["title", "content"],
								"properties": {
									"props": {
										"type": "object",
										"description": "Additional metadata (e.g., spark notes, tags)"
									},
									"title": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"content": {
										"type": "string",
										"description": "Markdown body with the user braindump/overview (stored in content column)"
									},
									"type_key": {
										"type": "string",
										"description": "Defaults to document.context.project"
									},
									"state_key": {
										"type": "string",
										"description": "Document state (defaults to draft). Valid: draft, in_review, ready, published, archived."
									}
								},
								"description": "Canonical context document (document.context.project) that will be linked to the project."
							}
						}
					},
					"id_args": [],
					"summary": "Create a new project in the ontology system with full structure.",
					"examples": [
						{
							"tool_call": {
								"name": "create_onto_project",
								"arguments": {
									"project": {
										"name": "<project name>",
										"type_key": "project.business.initiative"
									},
									"entities": [],
									"relationships": []
								}
							},
							"description": "Create a minimal project skeleton"
						},
						{
							"tool_call": {
								"name": "create_onto_project",
								"arguments": {
									"project": {
										"name": "Learn Spanish",
										"type_key": "project.education.skill"
									},
									"entities": [
										{
											"kind": "goal",
											"name": "Conversational fluency",
											"temp_id": "g1"
										}
									],
									"relationships": []
								}
							},
							"description": "Create a project with one explicit goal"
						},
						{
							"tool_call": {
								"name": "create_onto_project",
								"arguments": {
									"project": {
										"name": "Product Launch",
										"type_key": "project.business.product_launch"
									},
									"entities": [
										{
											"kind": "goal",
											"name": "Launch MVP by Q2",
											"temp_id": "g1"
										},
										{
											"kind": "task",
											"title": "Schedule kickoff meeting",
											"temp_id": "t1"
										},
										{
											"kind": "task",
											"title": "Review vendor proposals",
											"temp_id": "t2"
										}
									],
									"relationships": [
										{
											"to": {
												"kind": "task",
												"temp_id": "t1"
											},
											"from": {
												"kind": "goal",
												"temp_id": "g1"
											}
										},
										{
											"to": {
												"kind": "task",
												"temp_id": "t2"
											},
											"from": {
												"kind": "goal",
												"temp_id": "g1"
											}
										}
									]
								}
							},
							"description": "Create a project with one goal and explicit tasks"
						}
					],
					"tool_name": "create_onto_project",
					"description": "Create a new project in the ontology system with full structure.\n\nThis is the PRIMARY tool for creating projects. It uses **entities + relationships only**\nto build the project graph:\n- Entities represent goals, plans, tasks, documents, risks, etc.\n- Relationships are directional pairs that drive containment + semantic edges.\n- Context document linkage (document.context.project) is supported.\n- Documents created here (including the context document) are added to the project's doc_structure at root level unless moved later.\n\n**IMPORTANT**: Extract what the user explicitly mentioned. Don't add structure they didn't ask for:\n- Project name from context\n- Appropriate type_key classification using project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}]\n- Start date (default to today if not specified)\n- Facets (context, scale, stage) from user intent\n- Props extracted from user's message - CRITICAL!\n\n**Start Simple (CRITICAL):**\n- Most new projects just need: project + 1 goal (if an outcome is stated) + maybe a few tasks (if explicit actions are mentioned)\n- Don't add plans/milestones unless user mentions phases, dates, or workstreams\n- Don't add peripheral entities (risks, documents, metrics, sources) unless explicitly mentioned\n- Simple projects are GOOD - structure grows over time\n\n**Props Extraction (CRITICAL)**:\n1. Use the prop conventions (snake_case, booleans as is_* or has_*)\n2. Extract ALL relevant values from the user's message (e.g., genre, tech_stack, audience, deadlines)\n3. Populate project.props (JSONB) with inferred values plus facets (context/scale/stage) when present\n\nExample: User says \"wedding for 150 guests at Grand Hall\"\n→ props: { facets: {...}, venue_details: { name: \"Grand Hall\" }, guest_count: 150, budget: null }\n\n**When to use clarifications array**:\nOnly add clarification questions if CRITICAL information is missing that you cannot reasonably infer.\nFor example:\n- If user says \"create a book project\", DON'T ask for project name - infer it's about a book\n- If user says \"start a project\", DO ask what kind of project\nWhen using clarifications, still include entities: [] and relationships: [] in the payload.\n\n**Workflow**:\n1. Infer the right type_key from taxonomy (project.creative.book, project.technical.app, etc.)\n2. Extract props from the user's message using prop naming guidance\n3. Fill in ProjectSpec with inferred data AND extracted props\n4. Add clarifications[] only if essential info is missing\n5. Call this tool with the complete spec\n\n**Examples (Start Simple):**\n\nSIMPLE PROJECT (just a goal, no tasks - most common for new projects):\n{\n  \"project\": { \"name\": \"Learn Spanish\", \"type_key\": \"project.education.skill\" },\n  \"entities\": [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\", \"name\": \"Conversational fluency\" }],\n  \"relationships\": []\n}\n\nPROJECT WITH TASKS (user mentioned specific actions):\n{\n  \"project\": { \"name\": \"Product Launch\", \"type_key\": \"project.business.product_launch\" },\n  \"entities\": [\n    { \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\", \"name\": \"Launch MVP by Q2\" },\n    { \"temp_id\": \"t1\", \"kind\": \"task\", \"title\": \"Schedule kickoff meeting\" },\n    { \"temp_id\": \"t2\", \"kind\": \"task\", \"title\": \"Review vendor proposals\" }\n  ],\n  \"relationships\": [\n    [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\" }, { \"temp_id\": \"t1\", \"kind\": \"task\" }],\n    [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\" }, { \"temp_id\": \"t2\", \"kind\": \"task\" }]\n  ]\n}\n\nPROJECT WITH PHASES (user mentioned workstreams):\n{\n  \"project\": { \"name\": \"Wedding Planning\", \"type_key\": \"project.service.event\" },\n  \"entities\": [\n    { \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\", \"name\": \"Perfect wedding day\" },\n    { \"temp_id\": \"p1\", \"kind\": \"plan\", \"name\": \"Venue & Catering\" },\n    { \"temp_id\": \"p2\", \"kind\": \"plan\", \"name\": \"Guest Management\" }\n  ],\n  \"relationships\": [\n    [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\" }, { \"temp_id\": \"p1\", \"kind\": \"plan\" }],\n    [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\" }, { \"temp_id\": \"p2\", \"kind\": \"plan\" }]\n  ]\n}\n\n**ProjectSpec Structure (entities + relationships only)**:\n{\n  project: {\n    name: string (REQUIRED - infer from user message),\n    type_key: string (REQUIRED - classify via project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}]),\n    description?: string (infer from user message),\n    state_key?: string (default: \"planning\", valid: planning|active|completed|cancelled),\n    props?: { facets?: { context?, scale?, stage? } },\n    start_at?: ISO datetime (default to now),\n    end_at?: ISO datetime\n  },\n  entities: [\n    { temp_id: string, kind: \"goal|milestone|plan|task|document|risk|metric|source\", ... }\n  ],\n  relationships: [\n    [ { temp_id, kind }, { temp_id, kind } ],\n    { from: { temp_id, kind }, to: { temp_id, kind }, rel?, intent? }\n  ],\n  context_document?: { title: string, content: string, props? },\n  clarifications?: [{ key, question, required, choices?, help_text? }],\n  meta?: { model, confidence, suggested_facets } (NOT sent to API)\n}\n\nRelationships are directional: [from, to] treats \"from\" as the entity being created/updated and \"to\" as its connection.\nentities + relationships are required even if empty (use [] for no links or clarifications).",
					"callable_tool": "create_onto_project",
					"required_args": ["project", "entities", "relationships"],
					"example_tool_call": {
						"tool_call": {
							"name": "create_onto_project",
							"arguments": {
								"project": {
									"name": "<project name>",
									"type_key": "project.business.initiative"
								},
								"entities": [],
								"relationships": []
							}
						}
					}
				},
				"created_at": "2026-04-11T01:39:12.135919+00:00"
			},
			"tool_result_source": "chat_tool_executions"
		},
		"created_at": "2026-04-11T01:38:09.913735+00:00"
	},

		"stream_run_id": "a83c99ca-bb01-40e3-8aca-bea0b102ce98",
		"client_turn_id": "9440c7f0-7df3-48c1-8a26-e03396589d8c",
		"tool_name": "skill_load",

		"arguments": {

		"result": {
			"id": "project_creation",
			"name": "Project Creation",
			"type": "skill",
			"notes": [
				"Project creation is a minimality exercise. Good first payloads are usually smaller than the model expects.",
				"The most common failure is omitting entities and relationships or leaving project fields empty after the user already provided enough context."
			],
			"format": "full",
			"summary": "Project creation playbook for turning a user idea into the smallest valid BuildOS project payload with inferred name, type_key, props, and only the initial structure the user actually described.",
			"version": "tool-registry/3f8e4f7d",
			"examples": [
				{
					"next_steps": [
						"Infer the project name and type_key from the message.",
						"If the exact args are unclear, call `tool_schema({ op: \"onto.project.create\" })`.",
						"Then call `create_onto_project({ ... })` with project plus empty entities and relationships arrays.",
						"Only ask a clarifying question if the request is too vague to classify at all."
					],
					"description": "Create a minimal project from a brief idea"
				},
				{
					"next_steps": [
						"Add one goal when the user stated the outcome explicitly.",
						"Add task entities only for concrete actions the user actually mentioned.",
						"Link the goal to those tasks only when the relationship is already clear from the request."
					],
					"description": "Create a project with one outcome and a few explicit actions"
				},
				{
					"next_steps": [
						"If the user gave enough signal to classify the project, still send the project skeleton.",
						"Use clarifications[] for only the missing critical points.",
						"Do not wait for perfect detail before creating the project."
					],
					"description": "Handle missing critical information without stalling"
				}
			],
			"markdown": "# Project Creation\n\nProject creation playbook for turning a user idea into the smallest valid BuildOS project payload with inferred name, type_key, props, and only the initial structure the user actually described.\n\n## When to Use\n- The chat is in project_create mode\n- The user wants to start a new project from scratch\n- You need to infer project name, type_key, and a minimal initial graph from a rough idea\n\n## Workflow\n1. Start from the smallest valid project payload: project { name, type_key }, entities: [], relationships: [].\n2. Infer project.name from the user message when it is reasonably clear. Do not ask for the name if the user already implied it.\n3. Infer project.type_key using the project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}] pattern. Pick the simplest accurate classification.\n4. Extract concrete details into project.description and project.props when the user provided them. Do not leave props empty when clear attributes were stated.\n5. If the user stated an outcome, add one goal entity. If the user listed concrete actions, add only those task entities. Add plans or milestones only when the user clearly described phases, workstreams, or date-driven structure.\n6. Always include entities and relationships arrays, even when they are empty.\n7. When you include relationships, each relationship item must use entity refs with temp_id and kind. Valid forms are [ { temp_id, kind }, { temp_id, kind } ] or { from: { temp_id, kind }, to: { temp_id, kind } }.\n8. Use clarifications[] only when critical information cannot be reasonably inferred. If clarification is needed, still send the project skeleton instead of abandoning the create call.\n9. After creation succeeds, summarize the new project briefly and continue in the created project context.\n\n## Related Tools\n- `onto.project.create`\n\n## Guardrails\n- Do not call `create_onto_project({})` or omit the required project payload.\n- Do not omit project, entities, or relationships from the payload.\n- Do not leave project.name or project.type_key blank when they can be inferred from the user message.\n- Do not add goals, plans, milestones, risks, or documents the user did not mention.\n- Do not encode relationships as raw temp_id strings like [\"g1\", \"t1\"]. Include temp_id and kind for both sides.\n- Do not over-structure a new project just because the schema allows it.\n\n## Examples\n### Create a minimal project from a brief idea\n- Infer the project name and type_key from the message.\n- If the exact args are unclear, call `tool_schema({ op: \"onto.project.create\" })`.\n- Then call `create_onto_project({ ... })` with project plus empty entities and relationships arrays.\n- Only ask a clarifying question if the request is too vague to classify at all.\n### Create a project with one outcome and a few explicit actions\n- Add one goal when the user stated the outcome explicitly.\n- Add task entities only for concrete actions the user actually mentioned.\n- Link the goal to those tasks only when the relationship is already clear from the request.\n### Handle missing critical information without stalling\n- If the user gave enough signal to classify the project, still send the project skeleton.\n- Use clarifications[] for only the missing critical points.\n- Do not wait for perfect detail before creating the project.\n\n## Notes\n- Project creation is a minimality exercise. Good first payloads are usually smaller than the model expects.\n- The most common failure is omitting entities and relationships or leaving project fields empty after the user already provided enough context.",
			"workflow": [
				"1) Start from the smallest valid project payload: project { name, type_key }, entities: [], relationships: [].",

				"3) Infer project.type_key using the project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}] pattern. Pick the simplest accurate classification.",
				"4) Extract concrete details into project.description and project.props when the user provided them. Do not leave props empty when clear attributes were stated.",
				"5) If the user stated an outcome, add one goal entity. If the user listed concrete actions, add only those task entities. Add plans or milestones only when the user clearly described phases, workstreams, or date-driven structure.",
				"6) Always include entities and relationships arrays, even when they are empty.",
				"7) When you include relationships, each relationship item must use entity refs with temp_id and kind. Valid forms are [ { temp_id, kind }, { temp_id, kind } ] or { from: { temp_id, kind }, to: { temp_id, kind } }.",
				"8) Use clarifications[] only when critical information cannot be reasonably inferred. If clarification is needed, still send the project skeleton instead of abandoning the create call.",
				"9) After creation succeeds, summarize the new project briefly and continue in the created project context."
			],

								"maximum": 1,

										"type": "string"
									},
									"stage": {
										"type": "string"
									},

									}

					},

						"properties": {
							"name": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "Project name (REQUIRED - infer from user message)"
							},
							"props": {
								"type": "object",
								"properties": {
									"facets": {
										"type": "object",
										"properties": {
											"scale": {
												"enum": [
													"micro",
													"small",
													"medium",
													"large",
													"epic"
												],
												"type": "string"

												"enum": [
													"discovery",
													"planning",
													"execution",
													"launch",
													"maintenance",
													"complete"

											"context": {
												"enum": [
													"personal",
													"client",
													"commercial",
													"internal",
													"open_source",
													"community",
													"academic",
													"nonprofit",
													"startup"
												],
												"type": "string"
											}
										},
										"description": "Standard facets (always include)"
									}
								},
								"description": "CRITICAL: Properties extracted from the user's message.\n\nThis object is stored as JSONB and SHOULD contain:\n1. facets (context, scale, stage) - Standard project facets\n2. ALL relevant properties with values from the user's message using prop naming\n\n**Extraction Process**:\n- Use prop naming guidance (snake_case, is_/has_ for booleans, *_count, target_*)\n- For each meaningful attribute the user mentions, add it to props\n- Use intelligent defaults for properties inferable from context\n\n**Examples**:\n- Software app: user says \"Next.js app on Vercel, MVP for indie creators\" → props: { tech_stack: [\"nextjs\"], deployment_target: \"vercel\", is_mvp: true, target_users: \"indie creators\" }\n- Business launch: user says \"product launch in Feb with $75k budget and 500 target customers\" → props: { launch_date: \"2025-02-01\", budget: 75000, target_customers: 500, channels: [\"email\", \"paid_social\"] }\n- Event: user says \"wedding for 200 guests at Grand Hall\" → props: { venue: \"Grand Hall\", guest_count: 200, budget: null }\n- Creative book: user says \"YA sci-fi novel, 80k words, due Sept 1\" → props: { genre: \"sci-fi\", audience: \"ya\", target_word_count: 80000, deadline_date: \"2025-09-01\" }\n- Course: user says \"live LLM safety course, 8 lessons, 45 minutes each\" → props: { topic: \"LLM safety\", lesson_count: 8, target_duration_minutes: 45, delivery_mode: \"live\" }\n\nDO NOT leave props empty when information is available in the conversation!"
							},
							"end_at": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "End date in ISO format (optional)"
							},
							"start_at": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "Start date in ISO format (optional, default to now)"
							},
							"type_key": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "Type classification (REQUIRED). Must use project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}] format with 3-4 segments. Realm MUST be one of: creative, technical, business, service, education, personal. Examples: \"project.business.product_launch\", \"project.creative.book\", \"project.technical.app.mobile\". Use the \"What does success look like?\" test to pick the right realm."
							},

							},

										"properties": {
											"kind": {
												"type": "string"
											},
											"temp_id": {
												"type": "string"
											}
										}
									},
									"maxItems": 2,
									"minItems": 2
								},
								{
									"type": "object",
									"required": ["from", "to"],
									"properties": {
										"to": {
											"type": "object",
											"required": ["temp_id", "kind"],
											"properties": {
												"kind": {
													"type": "string"
												},
												"temp_id": {
													"type": "string"
												}
											}
										},
										"rel": {
											"type": "string"
										},
										"from": {
											"type": "object",
											"required": ["temp_id", "kind"],
											"properties": {
												"kind": {
													"type": "string"
												},
												"temp_id": {
													"type": "string"
												}
											}
										},
										"intent": {
											"enum": ["containment", "semantic"],
											"type": "string"
										}
									}
								}
							]
						},
						"default": [],
						"description": "Directional connections between entities using temp_id (required even if empty). Each item can be [from, to] or { from, to, rel?, intent? }."
					},
					"clarifications": {
						"type": "array",
						"items": {
							"type": "object",
							"required": ["key", "question", "required"],
							"properties": {
								"key": {
									"type": "string",
									"description": "Unique key for this question"
								},
								"choices": {
									"type": "array",
									"items": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"description": "Optional predefined choices"
								},
								"question": {
									"type": "string",
									"description": "The question to ask"
								},
								"required": {
									"type": "boolean",
									"description": "Whether answer is required"
								},
								"help_text": {
									"type": "string"
								}
							}
						},
						"description": "Questions for user if critical info is missing (use sparingly)"
					},
					"context_document": {
						"type": "object",
						"required": ["title", "content"],
						"properties": {
							"props": {
								"type": "object",
								"description": "Additional metadata (e.g., spark notes, tags)"
							},
							"title": {
								"type": "string"
							},
							"content": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "Markdown body with the user braindump/overview (stored in content column)"
							},
							"type_key": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "Defaults to document.context.project"
							},
							"state_key": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "Document state (defaults to draft). Valid: draft, in_review, ready, published, archived."
							}
						},
						"description": "Canonical context document (document.context.project) that will be linked to the project."
					}
				}
			},
			"id_args": [],
			"summary": "Create a new project in the ontology system with full structure.",
			"examples": [
				{
					"tool_call": {
						"name": "create_onto_project",
						"arguments": {
							"project": {
								"name": "<project name>",
								"type_key": "project.business.initiative"
							},
							"entities": [],
							"relationships": []
						}
					},
					"description": "Create a minimal project skeleton"
				},
				{
					"tool_call": {
						"name": "create_onto_project",
						"arguments": {
							"project": {
								"name": "Learn Spanish",
								"type_key": "project.education.skill"
							},
							"entities": [
								{
									"kind": "goal",
									"name": "Conversational fluency",
									"temp_id": "g1"
								}
							],
							"relationships": []
						}
					},
					"description": "Create a project with one explicit goal"
				},
				{
					"tool_call": {
						"name": "create_onto_project",
						"arguments": {
							"project": {
								"name": "Product Launch",
								"type_key": "project.business.product_launch"
							},
							"entities": [
								{
									"kind": "goal",
									"name": "Launch MVP by Q2",
									"temp_id": "g1"
								},
								{
									"kind": "task",
									"title": "Schedule kickoff meeting",
									"temp_id": "t1"
								},
								{
									"kind": "task",
									"title": "Review vendor proposals",
									"temp_id": "t2"
								}
							],
							"relationships": [
								{
									"to": {
										"kind": "task",
										"temp_id": "t1"
									},
									"from": {
										"kind": "goal",
										"temp_id": "g1"
									}
								},
								{
									"to": {
										"kind": "task",
										"temp_id": "t2"
									},
									"from": {
										"kind": "goal",
										"temp_id": "g1"
									}
								}
							]
						}
					},
					"description": "Create a project with one goal and explicit tasks"
				}
			],
			"tool_name": "create_onto_project",
			"description": "Create a new project in the ontology system with full structure.\n\nThis is the PRIMARY tool for creating projects. It uses **entities + relationships only**\nto build the project graph:\n- Entities represent goals, plans, tasks, documents, risks, etc.\n- Relationships are directional pairs that drive containment + semantic edges.\n- Context document linkage (document.context.project) is supported.\n- Documents created here (including the context document) are added to the project's doc_structure at root level unless moved later.\n\n**IMPORTANT**: Extract what the user explicitly mentioned. Don't add structure they didn't ask for:\n- Project name from context\n- Appropriate type_key classification using project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}]\n- Start date (default to today if not specified)\n- Facets (context, scale, stage) from user intent\n- Props extracted from user's message - CRITICAL!\n\n**Start Simple (CRITICAL):**\n- Most new projects just need: project + 1 goal (if an outcome is stated) + maybe a few tasks (if explicit actions are mentioned)\n- Don't add plans/milestones unless user mentions phases, dates, or workstreams\n- Don't add peripheral entities (risks, documents, metrics, sources) unless explicitly mentioned\n- Simple projects are GOOD - structure grows over time\n\n**Props Extraction (CRITICAL)**:\n1. Use the prop conventions (snake_case, booleans as is_* or has_*)\n2. Extract ALL relevant values from the user's message (e.g., genre, tech_stack, audience, deadlines)\n3. Populate project.props (JSONB) with inferred values plus facets (context/scale/stage) when present\n\nExample: User says \"wedding for 150 guests at Grand Hall\"\n→ props: { facets: {...}, venue_details: { name: \"Grand Hall\" }, guest_count: 150, budget: null }\n\n**When to use clarifications array**:\nOnly add clarification questions if CRITICAL information is missing that you cannot reasonably infer.\nFor example:\n- If user says \"create a book project\", DON'T ask for project name - infer it's about a book\n- If user says \"start a project\", DO ask what kind of project\nWhen using clarifications, still include entities: [] and relationships: [] in the payload.\n\n**Workflow**:\n1. Infer the right type_key from taxonomy (project.creative.book, project.technical.app, etc.)\n2. Extract props from the user's message using prop naming guidance\n3. Fill in ProjectSpec with inferred data AND extracted props\n4. Add clarifications[] only if essential info is missing\n5. Call this tool with the complete spec\n\n**Examples (Start Simple):**\n\nSIMPLE PROJECT (just a goal, no tasks - most common for new projects):\n{\n  \"project\": { \"name\": \"Learn Spanish\", \"type_key\": \"project.education.skill\" },\n  \"entities\": [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\", \"name\": \"Conversational fluency\" }],\n  \"relationships\": []\n}\n\nPROJECT WITH TASKS (user mentioned specific actions):\n{\n  \"project\": { \"name\": \"Product Launch\", \"type_key\": \"project.business.product_launch\" },\n  \"entities\": [\n    { \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\", \"name\": \"Launch MVP by Q2\" },\n    { \"temp_id\": \"t1\", \"kind\": \"task\", \"title\": \"Schedule kickoff meeting\" },\n    { \"temp_id\": \"t2\", \"kind\": \"task\", \"title\": \"Review vendor proposals\" }\n  ],\n  \"relationships\": [\n    [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\" }, { \"temp_id\": \"t1\", \"kind\": \"task\" }],\n    [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\" }, { \"temp_id\": \"t2\", \"kind\": \"task\" }]\n  ]\n}\n\nPROJECT WITH PHASES (user mentioned workstreams):\n{\n  \"project\": { \"name\": \"Wedding Planning\", \"type_key\": \"project.service.event\" },\n  \"entities\": [\n    { \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\", \"name\": \"Perfect wedding day\" },\n    { \"temp_id\": \"p1\", \"kind\": \"plan\", \"name\": \"Venue & Catering\" },\n    { \"temp_id\": \"p2\", \"kind\": \"plan\", \"name\": \"Guest Management\" }\n  ],\n  \"relationships\": [\n    [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\" }, { \"temp_id\": \"p1\", \"kind\": \"plan\" }],\n    [{ \"temp_id\": \"g1\", \"kind\": \"goal\" }, { \"temp_id\": \"p2\", \"kind\": \"plan\" }]\n  ]\n}\n\n**ProjectSpec Structure (entities + relationships only)**:\n{\n  project: {\n    name: string (REQUIRED - infer from user message),\n    type_key: string (REQUIRED - classify via project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}]),\n    description?: string (infer from user message),\n    state_key?: string (default: \"planning\", valid: planning|active|completed|cancelled),\n    props?: { facets?: { context?, scale?, stage? } },\n    start_at?: ISO datetime (default to now),\n    end_at?: ISO datetime\n  },\n  entities: [\n    { temp_id: string, kind: \"goal|milestone|plan|task|document|risk|metric|source\", ... }\n  ],\n  relationships: [\n    [ { temp_id, kind }, { temp_id, kind } ],\n    { from: { temp_id, kind }, to: { temp_id, kind }, rel?, intent? }\n  ],\n  context_document?: { title: string, content: string, props? },\n  clarifications?: [{ key, question, required, choices?, help_text? }],\n  meta?: { model, confidence, suggested_facets } (NOT sent to API)\n}\n\nRelationships are directional: [from, to] treats \"from\" as the entity being created/updated and \"to\" as its connection.\nentities + relationships are required even if empty (use [] for no links or clarifications).",
			"callable_tool": "create_onto_project",
			"required_args": ["project", "entities", "relationships"],
			"example_tool_call": {
				"tool_call": {
					"name": "create_onto_project",
					"arguments": {
						"project": {
							"name": "<project name>",
							"type_key": "project.business.initiative"
						},
						"entities": [],
						"relationships": []
					}
				}
			}
		},
		"execution_time_ms": null,
		"tokens_consumed": null,
		"success": true,
		"error_message": null,

	},
	{
		"id": "e79ff0fc-fd25-4648-8e1a-1a7295d0bbe3",
		"session_id": "6fecab01-d7cf-420c-9845-85320dcad703",
		"message_id": "5bf127a1-f339-4631-9f96-5324004ded36",
		"turn_run_id": "4b2f2649-8564-4b8d-9eca-32701b22dc82",
		"stream_run_id": "53e899ef-58f3-4558-b6ba-1ad9cf982d1d",
		"client_turn_id": "ef34bf89-8288-42b6-a6c2-0608b281f068",
		"tool_name": "skill_load",
		"tool_category": null,
		"gateway_op": null,
		"help_path": null,
		"sequence_index": 1,
		"arguments": {
			"skill": "project_creation",
			"format": "full"
		},
		"result": {
			"id": "project_creation",
			"name": "Project Creation",
			"type": "skill",
			"notes": [
				"Project creation is a minimality exercise. Good first payloads are usually smaller than the model expects.",
				"The most common failure is omitting entities and relationships or leaving project fields empty after the user already provided enough context."
			],
			"format": "full",
			"summary": "Project creation playbook for turning a user idea into the smallest valid BuildOS project payload with inferred name, type_key, props, and only the initial structure the user actually described.",
			"version": "tool-registry/3f8e4f7d",
			"examples": [
				{
					"next_steps": [
						"Infer the project name and type_key from the message.",
						"If the exact args are unclear, call `tool_schema({ op: \"onto.project.create\" })`.",
						"Then call `create_onto_project({ ... })` with project plus empty entities and relationships arrays.",
						"Only ask a clarifying question if the request is too vague to classify at all."
					],
					"description": "Create a minimal project from a brief idea"
				},
				{
					"next_steps": [
						"Add one goal when the user stated the outcome explicitly.",
						"Add task entities only for concrete actions the user actually mentioned.",
						"Link the goal to those tasks only when the relationship is already clear from the request."
					],
					"description": "Create a project with one outcome and a few explicit actions"
				},
				{
					"next_steps": [
						"If the user gave enough signal to classify the project, still send the project skeleton.",
						"Use clarifications[] for only the missing critical points.",
						"Do not wait for perfect detail before creating the project."
					],
					"description": "Handle missing critical information without stalling"
				}
			],
			"markdown": "# Project Creation\n\nProject creation playbook for turning a user idea into the smallest valid BuildOS project payload with inferred name, type_key, props, and only the initial structure the user actually described.\n\n## When to Use\n- The chat is in project_create mode\n- The user wants to start a new project from scratch\n- You need to infer project name, type_key, and a minimal initial graph from a rough idea\n\n## Workflow\n1. Start from the smallest valid project payload: project { name, type_key }, entities: [], relationships: [].\n2. Infer project.name from the user message when it is reasonably clear. Do not ask for the name if the user already implied it.\n3. Infer project.type_key using the project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}] pattern. Pick the simplest accurate classification.\n4. Extract concrete details into project.description and project.props when the user provided them. Do not leave props empty when clear attributes were stated.\n5. If the user stated an outcome, add one goal entity. If the user listed concrete actions, add only those task entities. Add plans or milestones only when the user clearly described phases, workstreams, or date-driven structure.\n6. Always include entities and relationships arrays, even when they are empty.\n7. When you include relationships, each relationship item must use entity refs with temp_id and kind. Valid forms are [ { temp_id, kind }, { temp_id, kind } ] or { from: { temp_id, kind }, to: { temp_id, kind } }.\n8. Use clarifications[] only when critical information cannot be reasonably inferred. If clarification is needed, still send the project skeleton instead of abandoning the create call.\n9. After creation succeeds, summarize the new project briefly and continue in the created project context.\n\n## Related Tools\n- `onto.project.create`\n\n## Guardrails\n- Do not call `create_onto_project({})` or omit the required project payload.\n- Do not omit project, entities, or relationships from the payload.\n- Do not leave project.name or project.type_key blank when they can be inferred from the user message.\n- Do not add goals, plans, milestones, risks, or documents the user did not mention.\n- Do not encode relationships as raw temp_id strings like [\"g1\", \"t1\"]. Include temp_id and kind for both sides.\n- Do not over-structure a new project just because the schema allows it.\n\n## Examples\n### Create a minimal project from a brief idea\n- Infer the project name and type_key from the message.\n- If the exact args are unclear, call `tool_schema({ op: \"onto.project.create\" })`.\n- Then call `create_onto_project({ ... })` with project plus empty entities and relationships arrays.\n- Only ask a clarifying question if the request is too vague to classify at all.\n### Create a project with one outcome and a few explicit actions\n- Add one goal when the user stated the outcome explicitly.\n- Add task entities only for concrete actions the user actually mentioned.\n- Link the goal to those tasks only when the relationship is already clear from the request.\n### Handle missing critical information without stalling\n- If the user gave enough signal to classify the project, still send the project skeleton.\n- Use clarifications[] for only the missing critical points.\n- Do not wait for perfect detail before creating the project.\n\n## Notes\n- Project creation is a minimality exercise. Good first payloads are usually smaller than the model expects.\n- The most common failure is omitting entities and relationships or leaving project fields empty after the user already provided enough context.",
			"workflow": [
				"1) Start from the smallest valid project payload: project { name, type_key }, entities: [], relationships: [].",
				"2) Infer project.name from the user message when it is reasonably clear. Do not ask for the name if the user already implied it.",
				"3) Infer project.type_key using the project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}] pattern. Pick the simplest accurate classification.",
				"4) Extract concrete details into project.description and project.props when the user provided them. Do not leave props empty when clear attributes were stated.",
				"5) If the user stated an outcome, add one goal entity. If the user listed concrete actions, add only those task entities. Add plans or milestones only when the user clearly described phases, workstreams, or date-driven structure.",
				"6) Always include entities and relationships arrays, even when they are empty.",
				"7) When you include relationships, each relationship item must use entity refs with temp_id and kind. Valid forms are [ { temp_id, kind }, { temp_id, kind } ] or { from: { temp_id, kind }, to: { temp_id, kind } }.",
				"8) Use clarifications[] only when critical information cannot be reasonably inferred. If clarification is needed, still send the project skeleton instead of abandoning the create call.",
				"9) After creation succeeds, summarize the new project briefly and continue in the created project context."
			],
			"guardrails": [
				"Do not call `create_onto_project({})` or omit the required project payload.",
				"Do not omit project, entities, or relationships from the payload.",
				"Do not leave project.name or project.type_key blank when they can be inferred from the user message.",
				"Do not add goals, plans, milestones, risks, or documents the user did not mention.",
				"Do not encode relationships as raw temp_id strings like [\"g1\", \"t1\"]. Include temp_id and kind for both sides.",
				"Do not over-structure a new project just because the schema allows it."
			],
			"description": "Project creation playbook for turning a user idea into the smallest valid BuildOS project payload with inferred name, type_key, props, and only the initial structure the user actually described.",
			"related_ops": ["onto.project.create"],
			"when_to_use": [
				"The chat is in project_create mode",
				"The user wants to start a new project from scratch",
				"You need to infer project name, type_key, and a minimal initial graph from a rough idea"
			],
			"legacy_paths": ["onto.project.create.skill"]
		},

		"result": {
			"op": "onto.project.create",
			"args": [
				{
					"name": "project",
					"type": "object",
					"required": true,
					"description": "Project definition (REQUIRED)"
				},
				{
					"name": "entities",
					"type": "array",
					"default": [],
					"required": true,
					"description": "Required entity list using temp_id + kind. Use entities + relationships only."
				},
				{
					"name": "relationships",
					"type": "array",
					"default": [],
					"required": true,
					"description": "Directional connections between entities using temp_id (required even if empty). Each item can be [from, to] or { from, to, rel?, intent? }."
				},
				{
					"name": "context_document",
					"type": "object",
					"required": false,
					"description": "Canonical context document (document.context.project) that will be linked to the project."
				},
				{
					"name": "clarifications",
					"type": "array",
					"required": false,
					"description": "Questions for user if critical info is missing (use sparingly)"
				},
				{
					"name": "meta",
					"type": "object",
					"required": false,
					"description": "Metadata about the generation (optional)"
				}
			],
			"type": "tool_schema",
			"notes": [
				"onto.project.create requires input.project, input.entities, and input.relationships.",
				"input.project must include project.name and project.type_key. Use entities: [] and relationships: [] when starting minimal.",
				"Infer project.name and project.type_key from the user message when reasonably possible, and use clarifications[] only for critical missing information.",
				"If relationships are present, each item must be [ { temp_id, kind }, { temp_id, kind } ] or { from: { temp_id, kind }, to: { temp_id, kind } }. Never use raw string pairs like [\"g1\", \"t1\"]."
			],
			"usage": "create_onto_project({ ... })",
			"policy": {
				"do": [
					"Infer project name and type_key from the user message",
					"Keep structure minimal unless the user explicitly mentions more"
				],
				"dont": [
					"Do not add entities the user did not mention",
					"Do not leave props empty when details are provided"
				],
				"edge_cases": ["If critical info is missing, add clarifications[] and still create"]
			},
			"schema": {
				"type": "object",
				"required": ["project", "entities", "relationships"],
				"properties": {
					"meta": {
						"type": "object",
						"properties": {
							"model": {
								"type": "string"
							},
							"confidence": {
								"type": "number",
								"maximum": 1,
								"minimum": 0
							},
							"suggested_facets": {
								"type": "object",
								"properties": {
									"scale": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"stage": {
										"type": "string"
									},
									"context": {
										"type": "string"
									}
								}
							}
						},
						"description": "Metadata about the generation (optional)"
					},
					"project": {
						"type": "object",
						"required": ["name", "type_key"],
						"properties": {
							"name": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "Project name (REQUIRED - infer from user message)"
							},
							"props": {
								"type": "object",
								"properties": {
									"facets": {
										"type": "object",
										"properties": {
											"scale": {
												"enum": [
													"micro",
													"small",
													"medium",
													"large",
													"epic"
												],
												"type": "string"
											},
											"stage": {
												"enum": [
													"discovery",
													"planning",
													"execution",
													"launch",
													"maintenance",
													"complete"
												],
												"type": "string"
											},
											"context": {
												"enum": [
													"personal",
													"client",
													"commercial",
													"internal",
													"open_source",
													"community",
													"academic",
													"nonprofit",
													"startup"
												],
												"type": "string"
											}
										},
										"description": "Standard facets (always include)"
									}
								},
								"description": "CRITICAL: Properties extracted from the user's message.\n\nThis object is stored as JSONB and SHOULD contain:\n1. facets (context, scale, stage) - Standard project facets\n2. ALL relevant properties with values from the user's message using prop naming\n\n**Extraction Process**:\n- Use prop naming guidance (snake_case, is_/has_ for booleans, *_count, target_*)\n- For each meaningful attribute the user mentions, add it to props\n- Use intelligent defaults for properties inferable from context\n\n**Examples**:\n- Software app: user says \"Next.js app on Vercel, MVP for indie creators\" → props: { tech_stack: [\"nextjs\"], deployment_target: \"vercel\", is_mvp: true, target_users: \"indie creators\" }\n- Business launch: user says \"product launch in Feb with $75k budget and 500 target customers\" → props: { launch_date: \"2025-02-01\", budget: 75000, target_customers: 500, channels: [\"email\", \"paid_social\"] }\n- Event: user says \"wedding for 200 guests at Grand Hall\" → props: { venue: \"Grand Hall\", guest_count: 200, budget: null }\n- Creative book: user says \"YA sci-fi novel, 80k words, due Sept 1\" → props: { genre: \"sci-fi\", audience: \"ya\", target_word_count: 80000, deadline_date: \"2025-09-01\" }\n- Course: user says \"live LLM safety course, 8 lessons, 45 minutes each\" → props: { topic: \"LLM safety\", lesson_count: 8, target_duration_minutes: 45, delivery_mode: \"live\" }\n\nDO NOT leave props empty when information is available in the conversation!"
							},
							"end_at": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "End date in ISO format (optional)"
							},
							"start_at": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "Start date in ISO format (optional, default to now)"
							},
							"type_key": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "Type classification (REQUIRED). Must use project.{realm}.{domain}[.{variant}] format with 3-4 segments. Realm MUST be one of: creative, technical, business, service, education, personal. Examples: \"project.business.product_launch\", \"project.creative.book\", \"project.technical.app.mobile\". Use the \"What does success look like?\" test to pick the right realm."
							},
							"state_key": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "Initial state (optional, defaults to \"planning\"). Valid: planning, active, completed, cancelled."
							},
							"description": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "Project description (optional - infer from user message)"
							}
						},
						"description": "Project definition (REQUIRED)"
					},

						"type": "array",

								},

								},
								"end_date": {

								},
								"priority": {
									"type": "number"
								},
								"start_at": {
									"type": "string"
								},
								"type_key": {
									"type": "string"
								},
								"state_key": {
									"type": "string"
								},
								"definition": {
									"type": "string"
								},
								"start_date": {
									"type": "string"
								},
								"description": {
									"type": "string"
								},
								"probability": {
									"type": "number"
								},
								"target_date": {
									"type": "string"
								},
								"snapshot_uri": {
									"type": "string"
								},
								"target_value": {
									"type": "number"
								},
								"body_markdown": {
									"type": "string"
								},
								"measurement_criteria": {
									"type": "string"
								}
							}
						},
						"default": [],
						"description": "Required entity list using temp_id + kind. Use entities + relationships only."
					},
					"relationships": {
						"type": "array",
						"items": {
							"oneOf": [
								{
									"type": "array",
									"items": {
										"type": "object",
										"required": ["temp_id", "kind"],
										"properties": {
											"kind": {
												"type": "string"
											},
											"temp_id": {

											}
										}
									},
									"maxItems": 2,
									"minItems": 2
								},
								{
									"type": "object",

									"properties": {
										"to": {
											"type": "object",

												},

											"type": "object",
											"required": ["temp_id", "kind"],
											"properties": {

							},

							},

							},
							"type_key": {

								"description": "Defaults to document.context.project"
							},
							"state_key": {
								"type": "string",
								"description": "Document state (defaults to draft). Valid: draft, in_review, ready, published, archived."
							}
						},
						"description": "Canonical context document (document.context.project) that will be linked to the project."
					}
